mapper.select: select access_key from t_oa_enterprise where enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
select * from t_oa_enterprise where FIND_IN_SET(#{domainName},domain_name) and deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} and disabled_flag = #{disabledFlag}
select * from t_oa_enterprise where deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} and disabled_flag = #{disabledFlag}
